prompt: Simulate spinal curvature in the source X-ray using the deformity pattern from the reference image.
prompt_refined: Edit the X-ray in image 1. Transform the straight spine in image 1 to exhibit a spinal curvature. The exact S-shaped deformity pattern for this curvature should be derived and replicated from the spine shown in image 2. Maintain the photorealistic X-ray style throughout the edited image.
